raw_responses.title: Gated Attention for LLMs (NeurIPS 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: head-specific sigmoid gate after SDPA; query-dependent sparse gating modulates head output; mitigates massive activation + attention sink.

raw_responses.title: HEADINFER: Memory-Efficient LLM Inference by Head-wise Offloading (2025/02)
Recurrent Memory-Augmented Transformers Chunked Attention (2025/07)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: restricted self-attention within chunks; 3 attention streams aggregated via LEARNED GATED SUM — gates per stream.

raw_responses.title: Masked Gated Linear Unit (MGLU, 2025/06)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: MGLUs learn multiple BINARY MASKS determining gate OR value assignments at element level on shared weight matrix; FlashMGLU 19.7x speedup.

raw_responses.title: Gated Linear Unit overview
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: GLU modulates each dimension independently based on both projections.

raw_responses.title: GLU: FFN Architecture Behind Modern LLMs
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: SwiGLU/GeGLU power LLaMA, Mistral; per-channel gating in FFN.

raw_responses.title: NeurIPS 2025 Gated Attention
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: head-specific gate after SDPA solves training stability, representation sparsity, attention pathology; integrated in Qwen3-Next.
